privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting up Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM) logging in SUMO for the Bologna Pasubio scenario. The correct output SSM file must be /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ssm.xml, configured in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_ssm.sumocfg. The required tracked measures are TTC and DRAC. Independent execution of the simulation using the provided scenario files deterministically generates an ssm.xml file containing exactly 193055 <conflict> XML elements. The agent must write this exact integer (193055) to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/conflict_count.txt.
